initial_diagnostic_question.question: Does this ECG suggest the presence of third degree AV block?

criterion_selection.question: To accurately diagnose third degree AV block, which of the following diagnostic criteria should be evaluated?
options: Presence of marked heart rate variability with respiration

finding.question: Regarding the criterion you selected, does this ECG show a slow heart rate? Note that a heart rate is considered to be slow if it is less than 70 beats per minute (bpm).

grounding.question: Which range does the measured heart rate fall into?

decision.question: Based on all the findings identified so far, does this ECG suggest the presence of third degree AV block?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
decision.answer: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis

criterion_selection.question: In addition to the finding you just identified, which other diagnostic criterion should be evaluated to diagnose third degree AV block?
options: Intermittent pauses disrupting a regular rhythm

finding.question: Regarding the criterion you selected, is the ventricular rhythm (the RR intervals) regular on this ECG?

decision.question: Based on the finding identified above, does this ECG suggest the presence of third degree AV block?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
decision.answer: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis

criterion_selection.question: In addition to the findings you have identified so far, which other diagnostic criterion should be evaluated to diagnose third degree AV block?
options: Absence of any atrial activity (isoelectric baseline)
Presence of distinct P waves with variable morphology

finding.question: Regarding the criterion you selected, does this ECG show fibrillatory waves with no visible P waves, suggesting atrial fibrillation?

decision.question: Based on all the findings identified so far, does this ECG suggest the presence of third degree AV block?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
decision.answer: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis

criterion_selection.question: In addition to the findings you have identified so far, which other diagnostic criterion should be evaluated to diagnose third degree AV block?
options: Fixed PR interval with intermittent conduction failure
Progressive prolongation of the PR interval

finding.question: Regarding the criterion you selected, is the atrial rhythm independent from the ventricular rhythm on this ECG?

decision.question: Based on all the findings identified so far, does this ECG suggest the presence of third degree AV block?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
